name: Paprika Spice (American)
recipeIngredient: a small piece of fresh ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the ginger and garlic in a mortar until finely blended.
2. Add the paprika and cumin to the mortar, and continue pounding until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Use this pungent blend with chicken or any other dish that benefits from its light red color and spicy flavor.
Note: This recipe is inspired by Jill Norman's "The Complete Book of Spices" (Viking Studio Books, 1991).
